info.title: Shop Admin API
info.description: API for Shop Admin Management System

post.description: Register a new user account with email and password (validation: name required max:255, email required unique, password required min:8 confirmed)

password.description: Password must be at least 8 characters

422.description: Validation error: invalid email, password too short, email already exists, or passwords don't match

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password to receive JWT token (validation: email required valid format, password required min:8)

422.description: Validation error: invalid email format or password too short

get.description: Returns a paginated collection of active categories. Supports filtering by search, status, parent_id, has_children, sort.

post.description: Admin only. Creates a category with a unique name.

get.summary: Get a single category by ID
get.description: Returns a single category. No authentication required.

delete.description: Admin only. Soft deletes a category (recoverable via restore). Returns no data payload.

patch.description: Admin only. Updates name and/or description. Name must be unique, ignoring the current category's own record.

get.description: Admin only. Returns paginated soft-deleted categories. Hardcoded page size of 15 items.

patch.description: Admin only. Recovers a previously soft-deleted category.

delete.description: Admin only. Permanently removes a category. Cannot be undone. Returns no data payload.

get.summary: List orders belonging to authenticated user
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of orders for the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new order for guest or authenticated users with customer and items payload. After creation, a queued SendOrderCreatedEmail job is dispatched after transaction commit.

product_id.description: Valid product ID that exists in database

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific order that belongs to the authenticated user.

404.description: Order not found or does not belong to user

get.summary: List products with filters and pagination
get.description: Retrieve paginated products. Public endpoint with optional filtering by search, category, and status.

get.summary: Get a single product by ID

requestBody.description: Product data (all fields optional for PATCH)

get.summary: Get a single product by slug

get.description: List soft-deleted products with pagination (Admin only)

post.description: Export products to CSV or Excel format (Admin only, async)

get.description: Download a previously exported product file
Get paginated product reviews with optional rating filter and sorting

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to retrieve reviews for

parameters.name: rating
parameters.description: Minimum rating filter (supports decimal values like 1, 1.5, 2, ..., 5)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort reviews by creation date or rating

post.description: Create a product review. Supports guest and authenticated users

get.description: Get paginated list of users with optional search (Admin only)

post.description: Create a new user (Admin only). Validation: name required max:255, email required unique, password required min:6 confirmed, role required in:admin,user

get.description: Get a single user's information (Admin only)

patch.description: Update user information (Admin only). Validation: email unique except current, password optional min:6

password.description: Optional, only provided if changing password

patch.description: Restore a soft deleted user (Admin only)

delete.description: Permanently delete a user from database (Admin only)

bearerAuth.description: Enter your Bearer token in the format: Bearer {token}
